name: Dog Fest Turkey Medallions (55G)
description: Delicious, tender turkey medallion is a perfect reward. Known for being very gentle on a dog's stomach, this is a type of treat you should always have with you when you are out with your furry friend. Composition: turkey, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 32, crude fat 8.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 21.
